= replace


Replaces all occurrences of a substring with another string. Use for text transformation, cleaning data, or normalizing strings.


== Parameters

[cols="1,1,3"]
|===
| Name | Type | Description

| `old`
| `string`
| A string to match against.

| `new`
| `string`
| A string to replace with.

|===
